author: Jason Peters
description: A locally-run dashboard plugin for the KAI Obsidian OS. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* chore: Fix Obsidian plugin publication errors (main.js and release workflow) by @jayp89 in https://github.com/jayp89/kai-command-center/pull/1
* ci: fix github release workflow errors by @jayp89 in https://github.com/jayp89/kai-command-center/pull/2
* fix: ensure github action target flag is properly evaluated and correct release versions by @jayp89 in https://github.com/jayp89/kai-command-center/pull/3
* Fix GitHub Action missing release assets by @jayp89 in https://github.com/jayp89/kai-command-center/pull/5

## New Contributors
* @jayp89 made their first contribution in https://github.com/jayp89/kai-command-center/pull/1

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jayp89/kai-command-center/compare/2.0.0...2.0.1
